{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45772", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-426", "name": "Untrusted Search Path"}], "description": "### Impact  

Turborepo can be vulnerable to arbitrary code execution when run in untrusted repositories that contain malicious Yarn configuration. In affected versions, package manager detection executed `yarn --version` from the project directory, which could cause Yarn to load and execute a project-controlled `yarnPath` from `.yarnrc.yml`. An attacker who controls repository contents could cause code execution when a user or CI system runs affected `turbo`, `@turbo/codemod`, or `@turbo/workspace` conversion commands.

### Fix  

Turbo now avoids executing project-local Yarn during package manager detection. Yarn versions and paths are inferred from metadata such as `package.json`, parsing the value of `yarnPath` in `.yarnrc.yml` rather than executing it, and `yarn.lock`, and unrecognized Yarn lockfile formats are rejected instead of falling back to executing `yarn`.

### Workarounds  

If you cannot upgrade immediately, do not run Turborepo commands in untrusted repositories. Review or remove `.yarnrc.yml` files that define `yarnPath` before running Turborepo, especially in CI or automated tooling that processes external projects.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00386, "percentile": 0.30517}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T19:46:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45772"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T16:16:14Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T19:46:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/security/advisories/GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45772", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/turborepo/security-advisories/GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/turborepo", "summary": "Turbo: Unexpected local code execution during Yarn Berry detection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T19:46:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.9.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "turbo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.0, < 2.9.14"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.9.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@turbo/codemod"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.3.4, < 2.9.14"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.9.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@turbo/workspaces"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.3.4, < 2.9.14"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Turbo: Unexpected local code execution during Yarn Berry detection
